title: French Gulab Jamun Dumplings
description: Indulge in this innovative fusion of French and Indian cuisines with these soft, fluffy dumplings filled with sweet gulab jamun. Perfect as a dessert or snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, milk, egg, sugar, salt, and cardamom powder. Mix well to form a smooth dough.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes soft and pliable.
Divide the dough into 12 equal portions.
Roll each portion into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place a gulab jamun in the center of each disk and fold the dough over to seal the dumpling.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat. Fry the dumplings until they are golden brown.
Drain the dumplings on paper towels and serve warm with rose syrup.
